system.description:
These are usually made with steel heads on a wooden haft. One-handed axes include boarding axes, hatchets, hand-axes, or tomahawks. A two-handed axe could be an executioner’s axe, woodcutter’s axe, battle axe, mattock, bardiche, or pole-axe. An axe does [[/r 1d6]] damage and can be thrown with a 10’ range increment. A two-handed axe does [[/r 1d6+2]] damage.

Axes are not very good defensive weapons; you get -1 to Parry with them, but they are good at hooking around another weapon, giving them +1 to Bind.
